dataSource.primary: NOAA Fisheries Greater Atlantic Regional Fisheries Office
dataSource.scallop: Framework Adjustment 39 - Atlantic Sea Scallop FMP

changes.title: Misc. species (25) and marine protected species (24) — dolphin/wahoo, CMP, forage, ESA
changes.description: DOLPHIN622_POLICY_CONFIG for mahi-mahi and wahoo (tigerfish) commercial/recreational limits, carcass rules, and north-of-39° N endorsement. CMP622_POLICY_CONFIG for king and Spanish mackerel 3,500 lb/trip and bag limits with updated minimum sizes (24″ and 12″ FL). FORAGE648_POLICY_CONFIG for Mid-Atlantic unmanaged forage 1,700 lb combined trip limit and transit rules. MPS24_POLICY_CONFIG and location checklist for ESA marine protected species. Species data updated from HMS/placeholder references.
sources: 50 CFR 622 Subpart Q — Coastal Migratory Pelagics
50 CFR 648 Subpart P — Mid-Atlantic Unmanaged Forage

changes.title: Striped bass, sturgeon, horseshoe crab, red drum, weakfish (697) policy and location checklist
changes.description: PROHIB697_POLICY_CONFIG for EEZ-prohibited striped bass (Block Island Sound transit exemption), sturgeon, red drum zone rules, horseshoe crab Shuster Reserve closure, and weakfish 150 lb commercial limit with gear mesh and restricted gear area. Location attestation for all five species groups. Species data updated from outdated 648/622 references to 50 CFR Part 697.
sources: 50 CFR Part 697 — Striped Bass, Sturgeon, Horseshoe Crab, Red Drum, Weakfish

changes.title: American lobster and Jonah crab (697) policy and location checklist
changes.description: LOBSTER697_POLICY_CONFIG for commercial trap/non-trap and charter/party limits, LMA min/max size and trap limits, prohibited conditions (egg-bearing, v-notch, mutilated, transfer at sea, partial meat), trap gear specs, Lobster Trap/Pot RGAs, area closed seasons, and MRA Wedge emergency closure. Jonah crab non-trap 1,000/50% rule and 4.75″ minimum. Location attestation for both species.
sources: 50 CFR Part 697 — American Lobster and Jonah Crab

changes.title: Tilefish and Northeast skate complex (648) policy and location checklists
changes.description: TILEFISH648_POLICY_CONFIG for golden/blueline commercial and for-hire limits, recreational tilefish permit, carcass rules, IFQ discard, blueline rec season, and Tilefish GRAs (Lydonia, Norfolk, Oceanographer, Veatch). SKATE648_POLICY_CONFIG for DAS trip limits, skate bait LOA, thorny prohibited, barndoor bait rules, carcass/wing ratio, and transfer at sea. Thorny skate marked prohibited. Location attestation for both fisheries.

changes.title: Spiny dogfish and Atlantic deep sea red crab (648) policy and location checklists
changes.description: DOGFISH648_POLICY_CONFIG for open access 7,500 lb/trip (one trip/day), recreational unlimited with state rules, 6.5″ mesh, gillnet length, sturgeon overnight soak areas, and exemption areas (Nantucket Shoals, GOM/GB, Cape Cod, SNE, Mid-Atlantic). REDFCRAB648_POLICY_CONFIG for LA Categories B/C unlimited, open access incidental 500 lb/trip, female tote limit, mutilation rules, trap/buoy requirements, and transfer prohibition. Location attestation for both fisheries.
sources: 50 CFR Part 648 — Atlantic Deep Sea Red Crab

changes.title: Atlantic bluefish and herring (648) policy and location checklists
changes.description: BLUEFISH648_POLICY_CONFIG for commercial moratorium unlimited possession, charter 7/person and recreational 5/person, operator permit, no min size/gear, charter person-count rule, and closed areas. HERRING648_POLICY_CONFIG for permit categories A–E, gear, Area 1A closure, transfer at sea, carriers, DOF, observer areas, and exempted fishing areas. Expanded herring648 and new bluefish648 location attestation. Herring permit categories and possession checks integrated.

changes.title: Black sea bass (648 Subpart I) policy and location checklist
changes.description: BSB648_POLICY_CONFIG for commercial unlimited in 100 lb totes, trawl 4.5″ mesh thresholds, trap/pot specs, transfer at sea prohibited, charter/rec conservation equivalency, and Scup GRA mesh rules. Location attestation for transfer at sea, trawl mesh, and Northern/Southern GRAs.
sources: 50 CFR Part 648 Subpart I — Black Sea Bass

changes.title: Scup (648 Subpart H) policy and location checklist
changes.description: SCUP648_POLICY_CONFIG for moratorium seasons (Winter I closed, Winter II 12,000 lb), charter/rec 40 fish, mesh tiers, trap/pot rules, transfer at sea, and Scup GRAs. Location attestation for Winter I, transfer at sea, Northern/Southern GRAs, reduced mesh trawl, and skin-off landing. Charter/party permit and possession checks added.

changes.title: Summer flounder (648 Subpart G) policy and location checklist
changes.description: SUMMERFLOUNDER648_POLICY_CONFIG for commercial moratorium, charter/party, conservation equivalency, mesh thresholds, small mesh LOA, TED sea turtle protection area, and sizes. Location attestation for TED, small mesh LOA east of 72°30′ W, and mesh-over-threshold. Charter/party permit added; federal recreational limit checks deferred to state CE.
sources: 50 CFR Part 648 Subpart G — Summer Flounder

changes.title: Monkfish (648) policy and location checklist
changes.description: MONKFISH648_POLICY_CONFIG for permit categories A–H and E, VMS/IVR, NFMA/SFMA, DAS limits, gear, sizes, offshore program, and exemption areas. New monkfish species data with assessment questions. Location attestation for canyon closures, GOM/GB gillnet, SNE trawl/gillnet, Mid-Atlantic exemption, NJ sturgeon area, and NFMA letter/VMS.

changes.title: NMS exempted fisheries location attestation
changes.description: Expanded groundfish location checklist: Small Mesh Areas 1–2, Raised Footrope/GOM Grate/Cultivator Shoal whiting, SNE Exemption, Little Tunny gillnet, Universal Redfish Exemption. GOM Cod Protection and Mobile Gear RGA questions refined for exemptions and seasonal closures.
sources: 50 CFR Part 648 Subpart F — Exempted fisheries and closed areas

changes.title: Northeast multispecies (648 Subpart F) policy
changes.description: NMS648_POLICY_CONFIG for permit categories, sector vs common pool, stock areas, recreational GOM rules, gear and closed areas. Expanded groundfish location checklist (RMA/stock area, roller gear, US/Canada, SAP, sector LOA, recreational cod outside GOM). Cod recreational bag corrected to GOM RMA rules.
sources: 50 CFR Part 648 Subpart F — Northeast Multispecies

changes.title: Standardized location checklists
changes.description: LOCATION_CHECKLIST_CONFIG merges yes/no special-location questions into assessment for scallop, surf clam/ocean quahog, SMB, herring, and groundfish. Inspector attestation — no GPS. Violations fire when inspector confirms closed area or prohibited location.
sources: 50 CFR Part 648 Subparts B, D, E, F, J

changes.title: Surf clam / ocean quahog (648 Subpart E) policy
changes.description: SURFCLAM648_POLICY_CONFIG for commercial unlimited per trip, recreational 2 bushels, cage tags, transfer/shucking rules, reporting, and year-round closed areas (Boston Foul Ground, 106 Dumpsite, NY Bight, Georges Bank PSP, GSC HMA). No federal minimum size per compliance chart.
sources: 50 CFR Part 648 Subpart E — Atlantic Surf Clam and Ocean Quahog

changes.title: Atlantic Sea Scallop (648 Subpart D) policy
changes.description: SCALLOP648_POLICY_CONFIG aligned with compliance chart: permit tiers, shoreward/VMS limits, LAGC IFQ/incidental/NGOM, recreational prohibition, crew/transit/access programs, gear/TDD, reporting, and Stellwagen shipwreck avoidance. Possession limits use in-shell pounds; LA unlimited on DAS.
sources: 50 CFR Part 648 Subpart D — Atlantic Sea Scallops
Framework Adjustment 39 — Atlantic Sea Scallop FMP

changes.title: Atlantic Salmon EEZ prohibition policy
changes.description: SALMON648_POLICY_CONFIG for EEZ prohibition and identification traits. Species marked prohibited; incidental release for maximum survival noted.
sources: 50 CFR Part 648 Subpart C — Atlantic Salmon

changes.title: Squid, mackerel, butterfish (648 Subpart B)
changes.description: SMB648_POLICY_CONFIG for squid/mackerel/butterfish permit tiers, trip limits, mesh, and exemption areas. SMB permit tiers in assessment, recreational mackerel 25/person. Policy panel for mackerel, longfin, illex, butterfish, chub mackerel.
sources: 50 CFR Part 648 Subpart B — Squid, Mackerel, Butterfish

changes.title: Swordfish charter/headboat split and blacknose latitude rule
changes.description: Swordfish recreational permit options split (charter 6, headboat 15) matching BFT pattern. Blacknose assessment adds catch latitude zone; retention prohibited north of 34°00′ N. Removed blacknose from generic prohibited-shark list.
sources: 50 CFR Part 635 — HMS sharks and swordfish

changes.title: HMS sharks, swordfish, billfish, and gear areas
changes.description: HMS_HMS_POLICY_CONFIG for sharks, swordfish, billfish, gear areas, and tuna measurement/carcass rules. Shortfin mako zero retention fixed. Swordfish recreational 4/vessel/trip. Billfish no trip limit and updated LJFL minimums. SCS recreational limits in SPECIES_GROUPS.

changes.title: HMS tunas policy and limits
changes.description: BFT recreational limits: Angler 2/vessel/day, Charter 3, Headboat 6 (max 1 large school/small medium). HMS_TUNAS_POLICY_CONFIG for selection-page policy panel. Trap prohibited for yellowfin/BAYS. EMS note for longline. Trophy fishery South closed, SNE/GOM open.

changes.title: Tier E: quota status, placeholder species data, HMS/648 limits
changes.description: FISHERY_QUOTA_STATUS_CONFIG for BFT seasonal limits, herring area 2,000 lb adjustments, skate wing trips, silver hake mesh limits, salmon EEZ prohibition, king/Spanish mackerel bag limits, tautog conservation equivalency notes. Wired into AssessmentViolations.

changes.title: UX, violations, and assessment flow improvements
changes.description: Shared AssessmentViolations module; skip empty vessel-requirements and unnecessary vessel-classification steps; dynamic report fields; summer flounder limit keys; simplified groundfish assessment questions; npm run validate.

changes.title: Tier D: sharks, groundfish trip limits, pre-report summary
changes.description: HMS shark recreational limits (635.22, 54" FL); shortfin mako and oceanic whitetip prohibited; cod/haddock common pool trip limits via GROUND_FISH_TRIP_LIMITS_CONFIG; pre-report violation summary overlay before full report.

changes.title: Tier C regulation refresh
changes.description: 2026 scup, black sea bass, and bluefish specifications; bluefish 5/7 bag limits; conservation equivalency notes for BSB; SPECIES_GROUPS 635.22 alignment; species-data validation script.

changes.title: Tier B regulation refresh
changes.description: 2026 summer flounder specifications and conservation equivalency notes; BAYS tuna (yellowfin/bigeye/skipjack/albacore) aligned with HMS 2025 compliance guide; hammerhead sharks (78" FL, 635.22, Caribbean prohibition); scallop access-area possession checks in assessment engine.

changes.title: Tier A regulation refresh
changes.description: Updated Tier A species (summer flounder, scallop, bluefin tuna, swordfish, sandbar/blacktip sharks) from NOAA bulletins and Framework 39. Bluefin June/July retention limits split; scallop access area trip limits; swordfish charter limits.

changes.title: Bluefin Tuna Jan 2026 closure
changes.description: General Category commercial BFT closure Jan 14 - Mar 31, 2026

verification.note: Tier A updates verified against NOAA bulletins listed in changes[].sources. Always confirm current quotas/closures before enforcement actions.
